title: Talk about school rules
subtitle: Explain simple rules and reasons.
overview: A2 Core builds practical control: daily tasks, simple stories, short writing, listening repair, and clearer spoken output.

sections.title: A2 core focus
rows: Students must not use phones during the test.
学生考试期间不能使用手机。
We have to speak English in class.
Can students use phones during the test?
学生考试期间能用手机吗？
No, they must not use phones.

items.en: Students must not use phones during the test.
items.zh: 学生考试期间不能使用手机。

items.en: We have to speak English in class.
Can students use phones during the test?
items.zh: 学生考试期间能用手机吗？

items.en: No, they must not use phones.
This is practical A2 English I can use in real life.
items.zh: 这是我能在真实生活中使用的实用 A2 英语。

items.en: I will change the details and say it about myself.
items.zh: 我会改变细节，说成关于我自己的内容。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can students use phones during the test?
lines.zh: 学生考试期间能用手机吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: No, they must not use phones.

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you give one more useful detail?
lines.zh: 你能再给一个有用的细节吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: We have to speak English in class.

items.en: Students must not use phones during the test.
items.zh: 学生考试期间不能使用手机。

items.en: We have to speak English in class.
Make a new version with your own place, time, or reason.
items.zh: 用你自己的地点、时间或原因造一个新版本。

items.en: Read it aloud until it sounds calm and natural.
items.zh: 大声朗读，直到听起来平稳自然。
